CustomField.formula: IF( ISNULL(Form_Renderer_Page_Base_Url__c), IF(CONTAINS($Setup.FieldKo_Kinetics_Setting__c.Form_Renderer_Page_URL__c, '?'), ($Setup.FieldKo_Kinetics_Setting__c.Form_Renderer_Page_URL__c & '&seqnum=' & GUID__c), ($Setup.FieldKo_Kinetics_Setting__c.Form_Renderer_Page_URL__c & '?seqnum=' & GUID__c)), IF(CONTAINS(Form_Renderer_Page_Base_Url__c, '?'), (Form_Renderer_Page_Base_Url__c & '&seqnum=' & GUID__c), (Form_Renderer_Page_Base_Url__c & '?seqnum=' & GUID__c)))
CustomField.label: PageUrl
